session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report the full results. This runs linting, type checking, and unit tests.
session.assistant: I'll run the fast-ci target and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci target for linting, type checking, and unit tests

session.tool_result:
Exit code 2 [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md [[33mwarn[39m] docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md [[33mwarn[39m] Code style issues found in 2 files. Run Prettier with --write to fix. âś“ AGENTS.md standard: PASSED
All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired.
CLAUDE.md files checked: 19 Violations: 0 make: *** [Makefile:97: fast-ci] Error 1
=== Fast CI ===
--- Lint --- All checks passed!
--- Format Check --- 1678 files already formatted
--- Prettier Check --- Checking formatting...
--- Markdown Check ---
--- Exec Reference Check --- FAIL: .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is out of date Run 'erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs' to regenerate it.
--- ty ---
... [108 lines omitted] ...
session.assistant:
The fast-ci target completed with one failure. Here are the results:
## Summary
**Status: FAILED** - One critical issue found
### Detailed Results:
**Prettier Check** - Code style issues found in 2 files: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md` - Run Prettier with --write to fix
**Exec Reference Check** - FAILED: `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is out of date - Fix: Run `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs` to regenerate it
### Passing Checks:
**Linting** - All checks passed!
**Format Check** - 1678 files already formatted
**Markdown Check** - Passed
**Type Checking (ty)** - All checks passed!
**Unit Tests** - erk: **5834 passed** in 22.08s - erk-dev: **136 passed** in 4.36s - erk-statusline: **115 passed** in 0.83s - erk-mcp: **24 passed**
### Issues to Fix:
1. Run Prettier on the two markdown files (can use `prettier --write` or equivalent) 2. Regenerate exec reference documentation using `erk-dev gen-exec-reference-docs`
